untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'candle pattern formation completion' and 'market context' (bull/bear market regimes) which cannot be precisely defined using only the allowed indicators. The source text is incomplete and does not provide quantifiable thresholds for pattern recognition or market regime identification. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT lack definition.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the core logic: gap open lower (black candle) on reversal day combined with moving average confirmation. Entry for LONG uses black candle (body < 0, open > prev_close gap down) with price above MA50. Entry for SHORT uses white candle with price below MA50. Exit conditions use MA50 crossover as reversal signal. Pattern completion itself is untranslatable without explicit pattern definition logic.
